title: Procheiron source record
description: Metadata for an immutable raw source captured under {paths.sources}/. Mirrors _memory/SCHEMA.md 'Source Record Schema'. Raw sources are append-only/immutable once captured (AGENT_BOOT §3, §5). No live source records exist yet (the _sources/ tree is scaffold), so this is a forward contract; the materializer (3.4) and capturers consume it.

origin.description: Local path, export name, or connector label.

source_path.description: Root-relative or {paths.sources}/... token form; machine-absolute discouraged (same data-plane weld class as memory source_paths).

sha256.description: Hex digest of the raw bytes, or null. Enables the materializer to prove source integrity.
